stockMarket.summary: Global markets face intense volatility as US-Iran geopolitical tensions escalate following President Trump's hawkish address, reversing de-escalation hopes. Oil prices spiked significantly on supply disruption fears, while gold retreated from its recent rally amid safe-haven reassessment and rising inflation concerns.
notableMoves: Oil prices: Brent crude rose to $105-$107/bbl; WTI crude trading ~$104-$105/bbl.
Precious metals: Gold fell ~2.7% to $4,631/oz; silver also dropped as market sentiment soured.
Market sentiment: US stock futures plunged (Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq-100 down); US dollar and Treasury yields rose.

exhibitions: Matisse's Jazz: Rhythms in Color (Art Institute of Chicago, through June 1)
More is More is More: A Melody of Maximalism (Art Center Waco, through Apr 25)
Gabriel Orozco Garden: The Three Friends of Winter (Leeum Museum of Art, Seoul)
